sourcesContent:
export interface Game {
  _id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  price: number;
  originalPrice?: number;
  discount?: number;
  category: string;
  platform: string;
  image: string;
  images: string[];
  availability: string;
  region: string;
  isNew?: boolean;
}
